zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice Grillo於1165年出生在義大利卡拉布里亞可洛托可洛托時，她的父親Don Giovanni Amico Di Grillo9歲，母親Donna Anna Amico Di Grillo26歲。她於1193年與Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1220年在義大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice Grillo于1165年出生在意大利卡拉布里亞可洛托可洛托时，她的父亲Don Giovanni Amico Di Grillo9岁，母亲Donna Anna Amico Di Grillo26岁。她于1193年与Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1220年在意大利利古里亞吉諾瓦吉諾瓦享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grillo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Rocco, Angelo, Vito, Mario, Sal, Carmela, Orlando, Aldo, Alfredo, Carlo, Domenic, Evelio, Rosario, Pasquale, Antonio, Carmine, Raul, Roberto, Sergio.
Italian: nickname for a cheerful person, from grillo ‘cricket’ (from Late Latin grillus; see Grill 1). This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Grill
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Franz, Otto, Alois, Bernhard, Ernst, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Konrad, Manfred, Monika.

German: nickname for a cheerful person, from Middle High German grille ‘cricket’ (Old High German grillo, from Late Latin grillus, Greek gryllos). The insect is widely supposed to be of a cheerful disposition, no doubt because of its habit of preferring hearths and warm places. The vocabulary word is confined largely to southern Germany and Austria, and it is in this region that the surname is most frequent. This surname is also found in Czechia and Slovenia (see 4 below).
German: habitational name from any of the eight places in Upper Bavaria and Austria, perhaps so named from Middle High German grille ‘cricket’ (see 1 above).

variants.name: Grilli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Salvatore, Donato, Enzo, Vito, Aldo, Angelo, Dino, Enrico, Ettore, Francesco, Geno.
patronymic or plural form of   Grillo  .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice Grillo was born in 1165, in Crotone, Crotone, Calabria, Italy, her father, Don Giovanni Amico Di Grillo, was 9 and her mother, Donna Anna Amico Di Grillo, was 26. She married Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna in 1193, in Genova, Liguria, Italy. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1220, in Genoa, Genova, Liguria, Italy, at the age of 55.

Elle a épousé Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna en 1193, à Genova, Liguria, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Genès, Genova, Liguria, Italie, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice Grillo(이)가 1165년 이탈리아 캘라브리아 크로톤 크로톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Don Giovanni Amico Di Grillo(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Donna Anna Amico Di Grillo(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1193년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바에서 Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 이탈리아 리구리아 노바 노바에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice Grillo родилась в 1165 г. в местности кротоун, кротоун, калабря, Италия, её отцу по имени Don Giovanni Amico Di Grillo было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Donna Anna Amico Di Grillo, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ugo Fieschi Conte di Lavagna в 1193 г. в местности дженова, лигуря, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности дженова, дженова, лигуря, Италия в возрасте 55 лет.
